summary: Full backend + frontend test of the РРР company management app. All 12 pytest backend tests pass (structure 109 ppl/7 subunits, config, equipment CRUD, equipment preset 33 records, equipment summary, interactions CRUD, interactions preset 11, all 3 XML exports parse as valid XML with expected task/resource counts, ZIP package contains 3 XML + 2 CSV, позаштатний equipment correctly exported with Group=позаштатний). Frontend UI smoke test: app loads in Ukrainian, 4 export buttons in header have correct /api/export hrefs, structure tree renders 8 root nodes, equipment editor opens on node click, can create+delete позаштатний equipment via UI, interactions tab loads with 11 preset channels, can create new interaction via UI, summary tab renders stats cards.

issues: Header buttons wrap to multiple lines on narrow viewports — acceptable but tight

critical_code_review_comments: server.py mixes concerns (CRUD + preset data + export). For maintainability, preset payloads (~50 lines) could be moved to a separate seed module, but file is still ~440 lines so not blocking.
xml_generators.py exceeds 650 lines — consider splitting into 3 files (org/command/interaction) if this grows further.
All MongoDB queries correctly project out _id. ✓
Pydantic models use Literal for type field. ✓
Minor: PUT /api/interactions/{iid} uses InteractionCreate (full replace) — clients must send all fields; this is OK for the current UI which sends complete form, but documenting it would help.
seed_data_creation: Equipment preset/typical (33 records) and interactions preset/typical (11 channels) called by tests; DB is left in seeded state for next run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs in <2s, 12/12 pass. The endpoint counts validated: structure=109 personnel/7 subunits, equipment preset=33 records, interactions preset=11 channels, command.xml=38 tasks (1 root + 7 phases + 30 sub-tasks), ZIP=5 files (3 XML + 2 CSV). For frontend UI tests, note: selector `[data-testid^="int-"]` matches both row containers AND inner del/edit buttons — use more specific `[data-testid^="int-del-"]` or `[data-testid^="int-"]:not([data-testid*="-del-"]):not([data-testid*="-edit-"])` for parent rows.
